common_corrections: Too many bullet points — prefers prose
Asks for reasoning before conclusions, not after
Does not want caveats repeated more than once
reinforced_behaviours: Asking a single clarifying question rather than a list
rejected_behaviours: Suggesting to 'consult a professional' without also answering the question
